mapper.sql: entry_id, space_id, parent_id, parent_key, active_name, type, name, object_id, version_id, size_bytes, mime_type, status, trashed_at, delete_after, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from drive_entry where space_id = #{spaceId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'TRASHED' order by trashed_at desc, entry_id desc
select from drive_entry where space_id = #{spaceId, jdbcType=BINARY} and status = 'ACTIVE' and lower(name) like concat('%', lower(#{keyword}), '%') order by name asc, entry_id asc limit #{limit}

with recursive descendants( entry_id, space_id, parent_id, parent_key, active_name, type, name, object_id, version_id, size_bytes, mime_type, status, trashed_at, delete_after, created_at, updated_at, tree_order ) as ( select , cast(concat(name, '/', entry_id) as varchar(4096)) as tree_order from drive_entry where space_id = #{spaceId, jdbcType=BINARY} and parent_id = #{folderId, jdbcType=BINARY} union all select child.entry_id, child.space_id, child.parent_id, child.parent_key, child.active_name, child.type, child.name, child.object_id, child.version_id, child.size_bytes, child.mime_type, child.status, child.trashed_at, child.delete_after, child.created_at, child.updated_at, concat(descendants.tree_order, '/', child.name, '/', child.entry_id) from drive_entry child join descendants on child.parent_id = descendants.entry_id where child.space_id = #{spaceId, jdbcType=BINARY} ) select entry_id, space_id, parent_id, parent_key, active_name, type, name, object_id, version_id, size_bytes, mime_type, status, trashed_at, delete_after, created_at, updated_at from descendants order by tree_order
mapper.insert: insert into drive_entry( entry_id, space_id, parent_id, parent_key, active_name, type, name, object_id, version_id, size_bytes, mime_type, status, trashed_at, delete_after, created_at, updated_at ) values( #{entryId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{spaceId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{parentKey}, #{activeName}, #{type}, #{name}, #{objectId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{versionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{sizeBytes}, #{mimeType}, #{status}, #{trashedAt}, #{deleteAfter}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: update drive_entry set space_id = #{spaceId, jdbcType=BINARY}, parent_id = #{parentId, jdbcType=BINARY}, parent_key = #{parentKey}, active_name = #{activeName}, type = #{type}, name = #{name}, object_id = #{objectId, jdbcType=BINARY}, version_id = #{versionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, size_bytes = #{sizeBytes}, mime_type = #{mimeType}, status = #{status}, trashed_at = #{trashedAt}, delete_after = #{deleteAfter}, created_at = #{createdAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where entry_id = #{entryId, jdbcType=BINARY}
